violations.description: Person in charge. — --Certified food service manager had an expired certificate or is no longer associated with this establishment. -No Serve Safe certificate on premise

Refrigerated Storage. — --Refrigerator or cold storage was insufficient or ineffective at maintaining potentially hazardous food at a temperature of 41F or less. -Coffee creamer with the requirement to keep refrigerated found in a non-operable dispenser.

Date marking and disposition of ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food. — --Refrigerated, ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food (prepared more than 24 hours ago) was not properly date marked. -Eggs in display cooler not date marked.
Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Ventilation hood system was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required. -Build up on ventilation system above pizza maker and fryer.
Available, knowledgeable, certified manager (4 pts deducted)
Date marking accomplished, discarded (2 pts deducted)
Available, knowledgeable, certified manager (4 pts deducted)
Hot holding and cold holding temperatures maintained, unwrapped food not reserved (5 pts deducted)
Available, knowledgeable, certified manager (4 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (2 pts deducted)
